ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the document */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Filename of the document */,
  "filetype" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., pdf, pptx, docx) */,
  "publishing_organization_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publishing organization */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject of the document */,
  "presenter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the presenter of the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the document */,
  "is_draft" INTEGER /* Whether the document is in draft mode */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the document */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_presenter_id FOREIGN KEY ("presenter_id") REFERENCES presenters ("presenter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_publishing_organization_id FOREIGN KEY ("publishing_organization_id") REFERENCES publishing_organizations ("publishing_organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishing_organizations" (
  "publishing_organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publishing organization */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the publishing organization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the publishing organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the publishing organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publishing_organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "presenters" (
  "presenter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each presenter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the presenter */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the presenter */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the presenter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("presenter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the document */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the version was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_document_categories" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user viewing the document */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was viewed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_views_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download event */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being downloaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user downloading the document */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was downloaded */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_downloads_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_downloads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
